groupTravel.title: Group Travel

student.name: Maria Popescu
student.text: As a student in Bucharest, I regularly travel home to Chisinau. The service is reliable and affordable with my student discount. The WiFi on board helps me study during the journey!

family.name: Ion Rusu
family.text: We frequently visit our relatives in Iasi with our children. The family package makes it affordable, and the staff is always helpful with our luggage.

business.name: Alexandru Munteanu
business.text: Regular business trips to Bucharest are comfortable and punctual. The early morning schedules are perfect for my meetings.

senior.name: Elena Cojocaru
senior.text: I visit my grandchildren in Constanta often. The senior discount is great, and the drivers are always very kind and patient.

regular.name: Vasile Moraru
regular.text: I've been using this service for two years now. The loyalty program and consistent service quality keep me coming back.

tourist.name: Nina Codreanu
tourist.text: Explored several Romanian cities using their services. The routes are convenient and the travel tips from drivers were very helpful!
